title: EMBER Electricity — Dual Metric Deceptive Drift Analysis v3.0
supersedes: EMBER-DRIFT-002 (v2.0 used L2 norm mislabeled as TV)
purpose: Forward signal triad domain 2: deceptive drift with corrected metric naming and dual metric comparison.
data_source: EMBER Monthly & Yearly Electricity Data (CC BY 4.0)

methodology_correction.v2_error: v2.0 defined 'tv' as sqrt(sum((p_i - q_i)^2)) — this is L2 norm (Euclidean distance), NOT total variation distance.
methodology_correction.v3_correction: Renamed L2 metric to 'l2_drift'. Added proper tv_distance = 0.5 * sum(|p_i - q_i|). Both computed throughout.
methodology_correction.mathematical_relationship: For probability vectors: TV distance = 0.5 * L1 norm; L2 distance = sqrt(sum of squared differences). L2 ≤ L1 always. TV ∈ [0,1] for distributions on same support. L2 ∈ [0, sqrt(2)] for probability vectors.

methodology.carrier: Fuel-type generation normalized to proportions summing to 1
methodology.l2_drift: L2 norm (Euclidean distance) of proportion differences — structural velocity metric (previously mislabeled 'tv')
methodology.tv_distance: Total variation distance = 0.5 * L1 norm of proportion differences — true probabilistic distance
methodology.deseasonalization: Year-over-year comparison: each period compared to same period previous year, removing seasonal patterns
methodology.yearly_drift_criterion: K_eff falling for 2 consecutive years AND velocity metric below series median
methodology.monthly_drift_criterion: 6-month window where avg YoY K_eff change < -0.05 AND avg YoY velocity < median

shock_analysis_l2.description: Coal share halved in one year

shock_analysis_tvd.description: Coal share halved in one year

Japan.deseasonalization_method: Year-over-year comparison (each month vs same month previous year)

deceptive_drift_l2.definition: 6-month window where avg YoY K_eff change < -0.05 AND avg YoY L2_drift < median

deceptive_drift_tvd.definition: 6-month window where avg YoY K_eff change < -0.05 AND avg YoY TV distance < median

deceptive_drift_tvd.definition: 6-month window where avg YoY K_eff change < -0.05 AND avg YoY TV distance < median
